LSE-HS9-L3-6501000-HSELA910-PPX-LAT-02  •  HS English 9-10  •  Analyze How an Author Unfolds a Series of Ideas

The Utuado Letters

Click   🎧   to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a girl and a boy. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer a question.
Listen to the Conversation
QUESTION:
What is the girl trying to decide?
Choose the best answer. You may change your answer before submitting.
SMART SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. Explain the link between what the girl observes about the letters and what she is trying to decide. Use your own words.
CA ELD PI.B.5  |  CCSS RI.9-10.3 / RL.9-10.3  |  HS English 9-10: Analyze How an Author Unfolds a Series of Ideas
